detail: ALL 6 Mar 8 ecom listings are skeleton templates. Description is identical 'Brand new, ships fast. Message me for bulk pricing.' across ALL products. Zero product-specific copy. Zero features. Zero differentiation. Titles are just product names with no keywords.
fix: Rewrite ecom listing generator to produce product-specific descriptions with features, benefits, keyword-rich titles, and competitive positioning. Each listing needs: 3+ bullet features, size/material specs, comparison to competitors, urgency angle.

detail: ALL Mar 8 freelance responses are IDENTICAL unfilled templates. Contains chatbot artifacts: 'Hi! I specialize in exactly this type of work.' and 'Happy to discuss scope and timeline.' Placeholders unfilled: [Specific deliverable], [realistic estimate], [Similar project], [Tool/tech stack match], [link]. CANNOT SEND. These are 100% AI-detectable.
fix: Freelance response generator must: 1) Read the actual job post content, 2) Reference specific deliverables from the post, 3) Include real portfolio links, 4) Use PRINTMAXXER casual voice, 5) Never use 'Hi!' or 'Happy to discuss'. Kill the template and rebuild from scratch.

detail: 55 rows of template slop. Every tweet uses 1 of 5 lazy prefixes ('tool find that saves hours.', 'every hustle needs purpose.', 'discipline compounds.', 'built this.', 'alpha:') pasted before raw alpha text. Not consequence-first. Not voice-matched. 2 em dashes found. Would @pipelineabuser never post these.
fix: Kill the CSV auto-generator or add LLM rewrite pass. Raw alpha + prefix is not content.

detail: Every tweet is identical template: 'found a [product] selling for $[X]. source price $[Y]. that's [Z]% margin before platform fees. the arb scanner catches these every 2 hours. just need accounts to start listing.' Zero variation across 17 products. Bot-detectable.
fix: Add 10+ template variants or use Opus to rewrite each with unique hook/angle.

detail: Same identical template as 2026-03-05. 13 products, 13 identical tweets. Only product name and numbers change. Will get account flagged for bot behavior if posted.

detail: Industrial template slop across 8 alpha entries (~50 pieces). Every entry generates IDENTICAL 3 tweets + IDENTICAL 7-tweet thread + IDENTICAL Reddit post + IDENTICAL newsletter. fix: scale_verdict_to_content.py needs complete rewrite. Each alpha entry needs unique angle, unique hook, unique thread structure. Cannot use same template for every entry.

reason: 460 entries from Feb 13 auto-generation batch. 5 lazy prefix templates (growth hack, tool find, signal, app store alpha, content format) pasted before raw alpha text. Same content duplicated across 4 accounts with different prefixes. Bot-detectable. Bulk blocked.
